name: python3-cli-helpers
title: python3-cli-helpers
description:
easy command-line apps with Python
CLI Helpers is a Python package that makes it easy to perform common tasks when
building command-line apps. It's a helper library for command-line interfaces.
.
Libraries like Click and Python Prompt Toolkit are amazing tools that help you
create quality apps. CLI Helpers complements these libraries by wrapping up
common tasks in simple interfaces.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-cli-helpers because easy command-line apps with Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-cli-helpers as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-cli-helpers with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-cli-helpers --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
